title: Keren Street Race
content:
{{Top|leg}}
{{Quote|This circuit will take you winding through the narrow bridges and streets of Keren and it is favored by the more technically minded racer. Focusing more on finesse then it does raw speed this course will definitely challenge your racing skills. Due to the danger street racing poses to pedestrians, the RSF does not approve of this activity so participation is at your own risk.|The race coordinator, to a spacer|<ref name="SWG:KSR">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=other|Swoop race track: "Keren Street Race" on Naboo}}</ref>}}
[[File:Keren_Street_Race.jpg|thumb|250px|right|Keren Stret Race]]
The '''Keren Street Race''' was a racing event held in the [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Keren/Legends|Keren]]. The race sent the racer through and around the city, and some considered it a challenge with all the tight turns and racing over bridges that were involved in the race. At one point, [[Ben Quadinaros/Legends|Ben Quadinaros]] held the fastest record on the track, but it was later broken by other racers.<ref name="SWG:KSR" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Keren Street Race appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG:KSR" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> It was added to the game with the "[[W:c:swg:Update Notes: 10 August 04|Publish 9.3]]," released on [[August 10]], [[2004]].<ref name="SonyCite-Publish 9: Secrets of the Force">{{SonyCite|url=recent_updates.jsp?o=62675|text=Publish 9: Secrets of the Force}}</ref>
